name: io.github.getmasv/masv
description: Provides tools to use MASV API. MASV is reliable and secure large file transfer service.

environmentVariables.name: MASV_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your MASV API key for authentication

environmentVariables.name: MASV_ALLOW_DELETE
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable delete operations for packages and portals
